Petition To Approve: Compromise Of Pending Action (Minor - David Fridshandt)
Off Calendar Aug-21-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for hearing on the Petition to Approve the Compromise of a Pending Actions for the Minors David Fridshtand and Dennis Fridshtand.
Dept. 514. Judge: Cynthia Ming-Mei Lee. Clerk: Kevin Dougherty. Reporter: Mitch L. Lyon, CSR #6840. Telephone: 415-551-3703.

Svetlana M. Shirinova, Esq. appeared with petitioner Michael Fridshtand, who was present as Guardian ad Litem for the minors David Fridshtand and Dennis Fridshtand, who was not present at this morning's hearing.
Petitioner was placed under oath and testified.
Order appointing Mr. Fridshtand Guardian ad Litem for the minors was filed on April 10, 2017.

On the basis of evidence received, and good cause appearing, the Petitions are granted and the compromises is approved as follows:

David Fridshtand
Settlement Amount - $85,000.00.
Attorney Fees - $21,250.00.
Medical Bills/Liens - $11,000.00.
Costs - $1,669.00.

The net balance of $51,080.00 shall be deposited into an UTMA account with Equian, Post Office Box 36380, Louisville, KY 40233. Daily City, CA 94015. No withdrawals shall be made without a written Court Order or until the minors reach the age of 18 years.

Dennis Fridshtand
Settlement Amount - $15,000.00.
Attorney Fees - $3,750.00.
Medical Bills/Liens - $2,533.00.
Costs - $1,217.00.

The net balance of $7,500.00 shall be deposited into an UTMA account with Equian, Post Office Box 36380, Louisville, KY 40233. Daily City, CA 94015. No withdrawals shall be made without a written Court Order or until the minors reach the age of 18 years.

Orders Approving the Compromises of the Pending Actions for the Minors were submitted to and signed by the Court.

Matter is CONTINUED to October 2, 2018 at 9:00 a.m. in Department 514 for Progress Report on the Status of the deposit of money into the UTMA Accounts for each of the minors.

Petition To Approve: Compromise Of Pending Action (Minor - Dennis Fridshtand)
